_comment: Detail pages za sve klikabilne kategorije (Humidor: oldworld/world; Spirits: whisky/bourbon/gin/cognac/rum/rakija; Gear: cutters/lighters/humidors/ashtrays/cases). Renderuje category.html#<key>. Tekst iz blog.json formata: srpski + engleski; markdown-light (** i *).

oldworld.titlesr: Stari svet — tradicija, nasleđe i autentično umeće.
oldworld.titleen: Old World — tradition, heritage and authentic craft.
oldworld.excerptsr: Cigare Starog sveta predstavljaju tradiciju, nasleđe i autentično umeće koje se generacijama prenosi kroz najpoznatije duvanske regije sveta.
oldworld.excerpten: Old World cigars stand for tradition, heritage and authentic craft passed down through generations across the world's most renowned tobacco regions.
oldworld.bodysr:
Cigare Starog sveta predstavljaju **tradiciju, nasleđe i autentično umeće** koje se generacijama prenosi kroz najpoznatije duvanske regije Kube. Karakterišu ih bogate arome, sofisticiran balans ukusa i prepoznatljiv karakter nastao dugogodišnjim iskustvom i pažljivo negovanim procesom proizvodnje.

U ovoj selekciji nalaze se legendarni kubanski brendovi koji su postali sinonim za vrhunske cigare i kulturu uživanja. Među najpoznatijima izdvajaju se:

- **COHIBA**
- **MONTECRISTO**
- **PARTAGAS**
- **ROMEO y JULIETA**
- **HOYO DE MONTERREY**
- **H. UPMANN**
- **BOLIVAR**

Brendovi čije ime već decenijama predstavlja standard kvaliteta i prestiža.
oldworld.bodyen:
Old World cigars stand for **tradition, heritage and authentic craft** passed down through generations across Cuba's most renowned tobacco regions. They are defined by rich aromas, a sophisticated balance of flavour, and a recognisable character forged through long experience and a carefully nurtured production process.

This selection holds the legendary Cuban brands that have become synonymous with the finest cigars and the culture of enjoying them. Among the most renowned:

- **COHIBA**
- **MONTECRISTO**
- **PARTAGAS**
- **ROMEO y JULIETA**
- **HOYO DE MONTERREY**
- **H. UPMANN**
- **BOLIVAR**

Names that have stood for the standard of quality and prestige for decades.

world.titlesr: Novi svet — savremen pristup i kreativnost.
world.titleen: New World — a modern approach and creativity.
world.excerptsr: Cigare Novog sveta donose savremen pristup, inovaciju i širok spektar aroma nastalih kombinovanjem tradicionalnih tehnika i modernog umeća proizvodnje.
world.excerpten: New World cigars bring a modern approach, innovation and a broad spectrum of aromas born from combining traditional techniques with contemporary craft.
world.bodysr:
Cigare Novog sveta donose **savremen pristup, inovaciju i širok spektar aroma** nastalih kombinovanjem tradicionalnih tehnika i modernog umeća proizvodnje.

Proizvedene u zemljama poput **Dominikanske Republike**, **Nikaragve**, **Hondurasa** i **Meksika**, ove cigare poznate su po punijem profilu ukusa, kompleksnosti i kreativnosti brendova.

U našoj ponudi Novog sveta nalaze se renomirani brendovi:

- **ARTURO FUENTE**
- **DAVIDOFF**
- **ROCKY PATEL**
- **HORACIO**
- **J. C. NEWMAN**
- **DREW ESTATE**
- **CASA TURENT**

Cigare koje su osvojile ljubitelje širom sveta svojim karakterom, kvalitetom i savremenim izrazom luksuza.
world.bodyen:
New World cigars bring a **modern approach, innovation and a broad spectrum of aromas** born from combining traditional techniques with contemporary craft.

Produced in countries such as the **Dominican Republic**, **Nicaragua**, **Honduras** and **Mexico**, these cigars are known for a fuller flavour profile, complexity and the creativity of their brands.

Our New World offering features established names:

- **ARTURO FUENTE**
- **DAVIDOFF**
- **ROCKY PATEL**
- **HORACIO**
- **J. C. NEWMAN**
- **DREW ESTATE**
- **CASA TURENT**

Cigars that have won enthusiasts worldwide with their character, quality and contemporary expression of luxury.

whisky.excerptsr: **101 viski iz 11 zemalja** — od škotskog Islay torfa, preko japanskog Yamazaki balansa, do tajvanskog Kavalan tropskog ubrzanja. Svaki regen ima ulogu uz cigaru.
whisky.excerpten: **101 whiskies from 11 countries** — from Scottish Islay peat, through Japanese Yamazaki balance, to Taiwanese Kavalan tropical acceleration. Each region plays a role beside the cigar.
whisky.bodysr:
Viski je najraznovrsnija kategorija u našoj polici:

- **ŠKOTSKI** (48) — Islay (Lagavulin, Laphroaig — torf!), Speyside (Macallan, Glenlivet — voće, šeri buria), Highland (Dalmore, Glenmorangie — lagano, cvetno), Lowland (Auchentoshan — meko, troputi distillation)
- **JAPANSKI** (17) — Yamazaki, Hibiki, Hakushu — balans, mizunara hrast, japanska preciznost
- **IRSKI** (9) — Jameson, Redbreast, Green Spot — troputi distillation, mekoća
- **VELŠKI** (4) — Penderyn — jedini velški, peat-free, Madeira finiš
- **KENTAKI** (4) — high-rye burboni iz Kentakija
- **TAJVANSKI** (4) — Kavalan — tropska klima ubrzava odležavanje (3 godine = 12 u Škotskoj)
- **KANADSKI** (3) — Crown Royal, Canadian Club — rye-based, blagi
- **AUSTRALIJSKI** (3) — Sullivans Cove — tasmanijski single malt
- **INDIJSKI** (3) — Amrut, Paul John — tropski malt
- **IZRAELSKI** (3) — Milk & Honey — Tel Aviv distillery
- **ITALIJANSKI** (3) — Puni — alpski single malt

Uz **kubansku** cigaru ide škotski Islay torfeni viski (Lagavulin 16, Laphroaig 10) — torf i kubanska aromatika se uzajamno pojačavaju.

Uz **dominikansku** cigaru ide japanski Hibiki ili Macallan šeri kaš — voće prati slatkast tobacco.

Uz **nikaragvansku full body** cigaru (Padrón Maduro) ide kentucky burbon ili Speyside šeri — visok ABV nosi snagu.
whisky.bodyen:
Whisky is the most diverse category on our shelf:

- **SCOTCH** (48) — Islay (Lagavulin, Laphroaig — peat!), Speyside (Macallan, Glenlivet — fruit, sherry casks), Highland (Dalmore, Glenmorangie — light, floral), Lowland (Auchentoshan — soft, triple-distilled)
- **JAPANESE** (17) — Yamazaki, Hibiki, Hakushu — balance, mizunara oak, Japanese precision
- **IRISH** (9) — Jameson, Redbreast, Green Spot — triple-distilled, soft
- **WELSH** (4) — Penderyn — the only Welsh, peat-free, Madeira finish
- **KENTUCKY** (4) — high-rye bourbons from Kentucky
- **TAIWANESE** (4) — Kavalan — tropical climate speeds maturation (3 years = 12 in Scotland)
- **CANADIAN** (3) — Crown Royal, Canadian Club — rye-based, mild
- **AUSTRALIAN** (3) — Sullivans Cove — Tasmanian single malt
- **INDIAN** (3) — Amrut, Paul John — tropical malt
- **ISRAELI** (3) — Milk & Honey — Tel Aviv distillery
- **ITALIAN** (3) — Puni — Alpine single malt

With a **Cuban** cigar, Scottish Islay peated whisky (Lagavulin 16, Laphroaig 10) — peat and Cuban aromatics amplify each other.

With a **Dominican** cigar, a Japanese Hibiki or Macallan sherry cask — fruit follows sweet tobacco.

With a **Nicaraguan full-body** cigar (Padrón Maduro), a Kentucky bourbon or Speyside sherry — high ABV carries the strength.

bourbon.excerptsr: Američki klasik. Minimum **51% kukuruza**, novo nagorelo bele hrastovo bure, bez aditiva — zakonski definisan kao **„America's Native Spirit"**. Naša polica nosi 12 burbona iz Kentakija.
bourbon.excerpten: An American classic. Minimum **51% corn**, new charred white-oak barrels, no additives — legally defined as **"America's Native Spirit".** Our shelf carries 12 bourbons from Kentucky.
bourbon.bodysr:
Burbon je viski sa zakonski definisanim pravilima:

- **51% minimum kukuruza** u mash bill-u
- **Novo, naročito nagorelo bele hrastovo bure** (barrel se koristi samo jednom za burbon!)
- **Maksimalna jačina destilacije 80% ABV**
- **U bure ne više od 62.5% ABV**
- **Bez aditiva** — boja i ukus dolaze isključivo od bureta

Nagorelo bure (*char level 4* = *alligator char*) razgrađuje šećere u drvetu i otpušta vanilu, karamelu, kokos, dim. Zato je burbon slađi i brže odležava od scotch whisky-ja.

Naša Kentucky polica:
- High-rye burboni — više začina, suvlji finiš
- Wheated burboni — više pšenice, mekši i slađi (Maker's Mark stil)
- Single barrel — jedan jedini barrel, jedinstveni profil
- Cask strength — bez razbljenja, do 65% ABV

Uz cigaru: burbon dobro prati nikaragvanske *full body* cigare (Padrón, Joya de Nicaragua) — visok ABV nosi snagu duvana. Single barrel vintage burbon ide uz limitirane kubanske *Edición Limitada* serije — dva fabrička vrhunca.
bourbon.bodyen:
Bourbon is whisky with legally defined rules:

- **51% minimum corn** in the mash bill
- **New, specifically charred white oak barrel** (barrel is used only once for bourbon!)
- **Maximum distillation strength 80% ABV**
- **Into the barrel no more than 62.5% ABV**
- **No additives** — colour and taste come exclusively from the barrel

The charred barrel (*char level 4* = *alligator char*) breaks down sugars in the wood, releasing vanilla, caramel, coconut, smoke. That's why bourbon is sweeter and matures faster than Scotch whisky.

Our Kentucky shelf:
- High-rye bourbons — more spice, drier finish
- Wheated bourbons — more wheat, softer and sweeter (Maker's Mark style)
- Single barrel — one barrel only, unique profile
- Cask strength — no dilution, up to 65% ABV

With a cigar: bourbon pairs well with Nicaraguan *full body* cigars (Padrón, Joya de Nicaragua) — high ABV carries the strength of the tobacco. Single barrel vintage bourbon goes with limited Cuban *Edición Limitada* series — two factory peaks.

gin.excerptsr: **22 džina iz 6 zemalja** — od engleske London Dry tradicije, preko škotskog Hendrick's eksperimenta, do nemačke i japanske botaničke preciznosti. **Juniper** je obavezan, sve ostalo je umetnost.
gin.excerpten: **22 gins from 6 countries** — from English London Dry tradition, through Scottish Hendrick's experimentation, to German and Japanese botanical precision. **Juniper** is mandatory, everything else is art.
gin.bodysr:
Džin počinje neutralnim alkoholom (najčešće od žita) koji se redestilira sa botanikalima. Jedino zakonsko pravilo: **juniperus (kleka) mora biti dominantna aroma**. Sve ostalo je sloboda.

Naša polica:
- **ŠKOTSKI** (5) — Hendrick's (krastavac, ruža), The Botanist Islay (22 lokalna botanikala)
- **ENGLESKI** (4) — London Dry tradicija — Beefeater, Tanqueray, Plymouth
- **FRANCUSKI** (4) — Citadelle (19 botanikala, šarantska tradicija)
- **NEMAČKI** (3) — Monkey 47 (47 botanikala iz Schwarzwalda)
- **JAPANSKI** (3) — Roku (yuzu, sakura, sansho biber)
- **SRPSKI** (3) — domaći craft džinovi sa lokalnim botanikalima

Kategorije po tradiciji:
- **London Dry** — najstroza, samo botanikali tokom destilacije, suvi finiš
- **Plymouth Gin** — geografska oznaka, samo iz grada Plymouth
- **Old Tom** — slađi, viktorijanski stil, savršen za Martinez koktel
- **Genever** — holandski preteča, malt bazna, slađa
- **New Western Dry** — moderni stil, juniper se povlači, ostali botanikali u prvi plan

Uz cigaru: džin retko ide direktno uz duvan (preosvezavajući), ali Negroni (džin + Campari + sweet vermouth) odlično prati prepuštenu cigaru posle obroka.
gin.bodyen:
Gin starts with neutral alcohol (usually from grain) that is redistilled with botanicals. The only legal rule: **juniper must be the dominant aroma**. Everything else is freedom.

Our shelf:
- **SCOTTISH** (5) — Hendrick's (cucumber, rose), The Botanist Islay (22 local botanicals)
- **ENGLISH** (4) — London Dry tradition — Beefeater, Tanqueray, Plymouth
- **FRENCH** (4) — Citadelle (19 botanicals, Charente tradition)
- **GERMAN** (3) — Monkey 47 (47 botanicals from the Black Forest)
- **JAPANESE** (3) — Roku (yuzu, sakura, sansho pepper)
- **SERBIAN** (3) — domestic craft gins with local botanicals

Categories by tradition:
- **London Dry** — strictest, only botanicals during distillation, dry finish
- **Plymouth Gin** — protected geographic origin, only from the city of Plymouth
- **Old Tom** — sweeter, Victorian style, perfect for the Martinez cocktail
- **Genever** — Dutch precursor, malt-based, sweeter
- **New Western Dry** — modern style, juniper recedes, other botanicals come forward

With a cigar: gin rarely pairs directly with tobacco (too refreshing), but a Negroni (gin + Campari + sweet vermouth) is excellent with a relaxed cigar after a meal.

cognac.titleen: Cognac — the king of French distillation.
cognac.excerptsr: **16 konjaka — francuski i jermenski** — od Hennessy, Rémy Martin i Courvoisier do jermenskog Ararata. Dvostruka destilacija u bakarnim kazanima, odležavanje u limousin hrastu, **VS / VSOP / XO** klase.
cognac.excerpten: **16 cognacs — French and Armenian** — from Hennessy, Rémy Martin and Courvoisier to Armenian Ararat. Double distillation in copper stills, ageing in Limousin oak, **VS / VSOP / XO** classes.
cognac.bodysr:
Konjak je geografski definisan: može da nosi to ime samo ako je destilovan u **regionu Cognac**, severozapadna Francuska, iz tačno definisanih sorti grožđa (najviše *Ugni Blanc*).

**Klase po starosti najmlađe rakije u blendu:**
- **VS** (Very Special) — minimum 2 godine
- **VSOP** (Very Superior Old Pale) — minimum 4 godine
- **Napoleon** — minimum 6 godina
- **XO** (Extra Old) — minimum 10 godina
- **XXO** — minimum 14 godina
- **Hors d'âge** — preko 30 godina, kuća-specifično

**Crus** (terroir) konjaka:
- *Grande Champagne* — najbolja zemlja, krečnjak, dugo odležavanje
- *Petite Champagne* — odmah ispod, slično
- *Borderies* — najmanja, cvetni profil
- *Fins Bois*, *Bons Bois*, *Bois Ordinaires*

Naša polica:
- **FRANCUSKI** (12) — Hennessy, Rémy Martin, Courvoisier, Martell, Camus, Hine — *Grand Cru* selekcije, XO klase
- **JERMENSKI** (4) — Ararat — armenski koniak, slađi, šeljaš profil, do 20 godina

Uz cigaru: XO francuski konjak ide uz **dominikanske** cigare srednje jačine (Davidoff, Fuente) — mekoća prati mekoću. Hennessy Paradis ide uz Cohiba Behike — ekstremna luksuzna spojka.
cognac.bodyen:
Cognac is geographically defined: it can carry that name only if distilled in the **Cognac region** of northwestern France, from precisely defined grape varieties (mostly *Ugni Blanc*).

**Classes by age of the youngest eau-de-vie in the blend:**
- **VS** (Very Special) — minimum 2 years
- **VSOP** (Very Superior Old Pale) — minimum 4 years
- **Napoleon** — minimum 6 years
- **XO** (Extra Old) — minimum 10 years
- **XXO** — minimum 14 years
- **Hors d'âge** — over 30 years, house-specific

**Crus** (terroir) of cognac:
- *Grande Champagne* — finest soil, limestone, long maturation
- *Petite Champagne* — directly below, similar
- *Borderies* — smallest, floral profile
- *Fins Bois*, *Bons Bois*, *Bois Ordinaires*

Our shelf:
- **FRENCH** (12) — Hennessy, Rémy Martin, Courvoisier, Martell, Camus, Hine — *Grand Cru* selections, XO classes
- **ARMENIAN** (4) — Ararat — Armenian *koniak*, sweeter, raisin profile, up to 20 years

With a cigar: XO French cognac pairs with **Dominican** medium-strength cigars (Davidoff, Fuente) — softness follows softness. Hennessy Paradis with a Cohiba Behike — an extreme luxury pairing.

rum.titleen: Rum — the Caribbean sun in a bottle.
rum.excerptsr: **11 rumova iz 3 regiona** — Venecuela (Diplomático, Pampero), Karibi (Plantation, Mount Gay) i Gvatemala (Zacapa). Rezultat fermentacije šećerne trske, rum je *najbliži* prirodni partner kubanskoj cigari.
rum.excerpten: **11 rums from 3 regions** — Venezuela (Diplomático, Pampero), the Caribbean (Plantation, Mount Gay) and Guatemala (Zacapa). The result of sugarcane fermentation, rum is the *closest* natural partner to a Cuban cigar.
rum.bodysr:
Rum potiče iz Kariba 17. veka — kao nusproizvod proizvodnje šećera od trske. Postoje **dva osnovna tipa**:

**1. Iz molase** (90% rumova): šećer se izvuče iz trske, ostatak (molasa) se fermentira → destiluje → odleži. Slađi, tamniji, kompleksniji. Većina karipskih, latinoameričkih.

**2. Iz svežeg soka trske** (rhum agricole): direktna fermentacija sveže iscedjenog soka. Travnati, suvi, *terroir*-orijentisan. Martinique francuska tradicija (zaštićeno poreklo).

**Klase po boji/odležavanju:**
- **Light/Silver** — neodležan, čist, za koktele (Mojito, Daiquiri)
- **Gold** — kratko odležan (1-3 god), karamela
- **Dark** — duže odležan (5-12 god), melasa, dim
- **Aged/XO** — 12+ godina, premium sipping
- **Spiced** — sa začinima (cimet, vanila) — Kraken, Captain Morgan

Naša polica:
- **VENECUELA** (5) — Diplomático Reserva Exclusiva (12 god), Pampero Aniversario (XO solera)
- **KARIBI** (3) — Plantation, Mount Gay — Barbados/Jamajka tradicija
- **GVATEMALA** (3) — Zacapa Centenario 23 — solera sistem na 2300m nadmorske visine

Uz cigaru: rum je **najprirodniji par** kubanskoj cigari — oboje rastu na istom karipskom suncu. Zacapa 23 sa Cohiba Robusto = klasik. Diplomático Reserva sa Romeo y Julieta Churchill = prijatelj na 60 minuta.
rum.bodyen:
Rum originates from the 17th-century Caribbean — as a byproduct of sugarcane sugar production. There are **two basic types**:

**1. From molasses** (90% of rums): sugar is extracted from the cane, the residue (molasses) is fermented → distilled → aged. Sweeter, darker, more complex. Most Caribbean and Latin American.

**2. From fresh cane juice** (rhum agricole): direct fermentation of freshly pressed juice. Grassy, dry, *terroir*-oriented. The French Martinique tradition (protected origin).

**Classes by colour/ageing:**
- **Light/Silver** — unaged, clean, for cocktails (Mojito, Daiquiri)
- **Gold** — briefly aged (1-3 years), caramel
- **Dark** — longer aged (5-12 years), molasses, smoke
- **Aged/XO** — 12+ years, premium sipping
- **Spiced** — with spices (cinnamon, vanilla) — Kraken, Captain Morgan

Our shelf:
- **VENEZUELA** (5) — Diplomático Reserva Exclusiva (12 years), Pampero Aniversario (XO solera)
- **CARIBBEAN** (3) — Plantation, Mount Gay — Barbados/Jamaica tradition
- **GUATEMALA** (3) — Zacapa Centenario 23 — solera system at 2,300 m altitude

With a cigar: rum is the **most natural pairing** with a Cuban cigar — both grow under the same Caribbean sun. Zacapa 23 with a Cohiba Robusto = a classic. Diplomático Reserva with a Romeo y Julieta Churchill = a friend for 60 minutes.

rakija.titleen: Rakija — the soul of the Balkans.
rakija.excerptsr: **28 srpskih rakija** — šljiva, kajsija, kruška, dunja, dud, viljamovka, lozovača — sve iz odabranih bačvi i destilerija sa srpskih voćnjaka. Naš autohtoni odgovor svetu konjaka i viskija.
rakija.excerpten: **28 Serbian rakijas** — plum, apricot, pear, quince, mulberry, williams pear, grape — all from selected casks and distilleries from Serbian orchards. Our native answer to the world of cognac and whisky.
rakija.bodysr:
Rakija je **srpski nacionalni alkohol** — voćna rakija (*fruit brandy*) sa zaštićenim geografskim poreklom. UNESCO ju je 2021. dodala na **listu nematerijalne baštine** Srbije i regiona.

**Tipovi po vrsti voća:**
- **Šljivovica** — od šljive Pozegača ili Madžarka, dvostruka destilacija u bakarnim kazanima, klasik za prijem gosta
- **Lozovača** — od grožđa, srodna italijanskoj grappa, suvlja
- **Kajsijevača** — od kajsije iz Slankamena, parfumi i meka
- **Dunjevača** — od dunje, najfinija aroma, najteža za destilaciju
- **Krušikovača** (Williams) — od kruške, savršeno čuvena za digestiv
- **Dudovača** — od bele/crne dude, retka i specifična
- **Komovica** — od komine grožđa, slično grappi
- **Travarica** — sa lekovitim biljem, jugoslovenski klasik

**Tipovi po odležavanju:**
- **Mlada** — neodležana, kristalna, intenzivna voćnost
- **Stara** — odležana u hrastu (3-5 god), zlatna, kompleksnija
- **Reserve** — odležana 7+ godina, premium sipping rakija

Naša polica nosi 28 selekcija od najprestižnijih srpskih destilerija — **Zarić, Stara Sokolova, Toma, Maraška, Dadić, Kovačević, Kosovac**, i mnogih manjih craft destilerija.

Uz cigaru: stara šljivovica ide uz **dominikanske** cigare srednje jačine — voće prati slatkoću. Stara dunjevača sa kubanskom *Robusto* vitolom = autentično balkansko-karipsko venčanje. Travarica sa nikaragvanskom cigarom = kontrast koji pamtiš.
rakija.bodyen:
Rakija is **Serbia's national spirit** — a fruit brandy with protected geographical origin. UNESCO added it to the **intangible heritage list** of Serbia and the region in 2021.

**Types by fruit:**
- **Šljivovica** (plum) — from Pozegača or Madžarka plum, double-distilled in copper stills, the classic guest welcome
- **Lozovača** (grape) — related to Italian grappa, drier
- **Kajsijevača** (apricot) — from Slankamen apricots, perfumed and soft
- **Dunjevača** (quince) — finest aroma, hardest to distil
- **Krušikovača** (Williams pear) — perfect digestif
- **Dudovača** (mulberry) — rare and specific
- **Komovica** (grape pomace) — similar to grappa
- **Travarica** (with herbs) — Yugoslav classic

**Types by ageing:**
- **Young** — unaged, crystal, intense fruit
- **Old** — aged in oak (3-5 years), golden, more complex
- **Reserve** — aged 7+ years, premium sipping rakija

Our shelf carries 28 selections from the most prestigious Serbian distilleries — **Zarić, Stara Sokolova, Toma, Maraška, Dadić, Kovačević, Kosovac**, and many smaller craft producers.

With a cigar: aged šljivovica goes with medium-strength **Dominican** cigars — fruit follows sweetness. Aged dunjevača with a Cuban *Robusto* vitola = an authentic Balkan-Caribbean wedding. Travarica with a Nicaraguan cigar = a contrast you remember.

cutters.titleen: Cutters — the first touch of the cigar.
cutters.excerptsr: **Giljotina, punch, V-cut**. Prvi dodir cigare je presudan — čist rez čuva aromu i vuče dim ravnomerno. Naš asortiman: **Xikar Xi1, S.T. Dupont MaxiJet, Les Fines Lames LE PETIT, Colibri V-Cut**.
cutters.excerpten: **Guillotine, punch, V-cut**. The first contact with the cigar is decisive — a clean cut preserves aroma and draws smoke evenly. Our range: **Xikar Xi1, S.T. Dupont MaxiJet, Les Fines Lames LE PETIT, Colibri V-Cut**.
cutters.bodysr:
Sekač definiše tri stvari: **količinu vuče**, **kondenzaciju ulja** i **dugovečnost** dima.

**Tipovi:**
- **Giljotina** (single ili double blade) — klasičan ravan rez, otvara širok protok. Najpopularniji izbor majstora.
- **Punch** — kružna rupa kroz glavu cigare, suvi rez, manji protok, manje šanse za odmotavanje wrappera. Idealno za vlažne klime.
- **V-cut** (cat's eye) — V-žlijeb kroz glavu, kompromis između giljotine i puncha. Koncentriše dim na sredinu jezika.

**Naš asortiman:**
- **Xikar Xi1 Guillotine** — dvostruko sečivo od 440 čelika, do 60 ring, doživotna garancija
- **S.T. Dupont MaxiJet Cutter** — francuska preciznost, ergonomska ručka, do 60 ring
- **Les Fines Lames LE PETIT** — luksuzna mini-giljotina sa nerdovim mehanizmom za sigurnost prsta
- **Colibri V-Cut** — 60 ring kapacitet, dijamantski uglovi za besprekoran rez

**Saveti za rez:**
- Cigaru drži vertikalno, sekač paralelno sa glavom
- Reži tačno na *cap line* — vidljivu liniju koja označava ručno aplicirani vrh
- Za cigare 50+ ring: giljotina; za 40-46: punch; za 47-52: V-cut savršeno
- Tup sečivo cepa wrapper — uvek održavaj oštrinu
cutters.bodyen:
The cutter defines three things: **draw volume**, **oil condensation** and **smoke longevity**.

**Types:**
- **Guillotine** (single or double blade) — classic flat cut, opens wide flow. The most popular choice among masters.
- **Punch** — circular hole through the cigar head, dry cut, smaller flow, less chance of wrapper unrolling. Ideal for humid climates.
- **V-cut** (cat's eye) — V-groove through the head, a compromise between guillotine and punch. Concentrates smoke on the centre of the tongue.

**Our range:**
- **Xikar Xi1 Guillotine** — double 440-steel blade, up to 60 ring, lifetime warranty
- **S.T. Dupont MaxiJet Cutter** — French precision, ergonomic handle, up to 60 ring
- **Les Fines Lames LE PETIT** — luxury mini-guillotine with a nerd-finger safety mechanism
- **Colibri V-Cut** — 60 ring capacity, diamond edges for a flawless cut

**Cutting tips:**
- Hold the cigar vertically, the cutter parallel to the head
- Cut exactly on the *cap line* — the visible mark indicating the hand-applied tip
- For 50+ ring cigars: guillotine; for 40-46: punch; for 47-52: V-cut perfectly
- A dull blade tears the wrapper — always keep the edge sharp

lighters.titleen: Lighters — clean heat with no scent.
lighters.excerptsr: **Trostruki butan za brzo paljenje, cedrove šibice za ritual**. Bez mirisa, bez benzina — vaš duvan zaslužuje čistu toplotu. Naš asortiman: **Xikar Stratosphere II, S.T. Dupont Ligne 2, Colibri Quasar Triple, cedrove šibice Fuente**.
lighters.excerpten: **Triple butane for a fast light, cedar matches for the ritual**. No scent, no petrol — your tobacco deserves clean heat. Our range: **Xikar Stratosphere II, S.T. Dupont Ligne 2, Colibri Quasar Triple, Fuente cedar matches**.
lighters.bodysr:
Upaljač je **drugi najvažniji alat** rituala — pogrešna toplota uništava prvi povlak.

**Tipovi:**
- **Soft flame (mekani plamen)** — klasik, niža temperatura (~1300°C), gradacija po sloju. Najprirodnija aroma. S.T. Dupont Ligne 2 je referenca.
- **Jet flame (turbo plamen)** — visoka temperatura (~2300°C), brzo i ravnomerno paljenje, savršeno za vetar i veće cigare. Xikar Stratosphere II.
- **Triple jet** — tri plamena u jednom, najbrže paljenje cigara od 60+ ring. Colibri Quasar.
- **Cedrove šibice** — tradicionalni ritual, **bez ikakvih hemikalija**, sušene cedrove letvice koje gore kao šibice.

**Pravilo: nikada benzin (Zippo)** — sumporna komponenta dirne wrapper i ostavi metalni okus. Uvek **butan** ili **cedar**.

**Tehnika paljenja:**
1. Dranje cigare (toasting) — drži cigaru u uglu od 45°, plamen 1-2 cm ispod, lagano rotiraj 5-10 sekundi
2. Provera žari — duvanj treba ravnomerno crvene po čitavom obodu (bez crnih mrlja)
3. Prvi povlak — par sekundi, kratak, da se aroma stabilizuje
4. Pravi povlaci — duboki, ali bez inhalacije (cigara nije cigareta!)

**Naš asortiman:**
- **Xikar Stratosphere II** — single jet, *high-altitude ready* do 4500m, refilable, doživotna garancija
- **S.T. Dupont Ligne 2** — meka flama, francuski klasik, prelivani **palladium** ili **gold**
- **Colibri Quasar Triple** — tri jet plamena u redu, 60+ ring kompatibilan
- **Cedrove šibice (Fuente)** — tradicionalno, bez sumpora, idealno za laku početni dim
lighters.bodyen:
The lighter is the **second most important tool** of the ritual — wrong heat ruins the first draw.

**Types:**
- **Soft flame** — classic, lower temperature (~1300°C), gradual layering. Most natural aroma. S.T. Dupont Ligne 2 is the reference.
- **Jet flame** — high temperature (~2300°C), fast and even lighting, perfect for wind and larger cigars. Xikar Stratosphere II.
- **Triple jet** — three flames in one, fastest lighting of 60+ ring cigars. Colibri Quasar.
- **Cedar matches** — traditional ritual, **no chemicals**, dried cedar splints that burn like matches.

**Rule: never petrol (Zippo)** — the sulphur component touches the wrapper and leaves a metallic taste. Always **butane** or **cedar**.

**Lighting technique:**
1. Toasting — hold the cigar at a 45° angle, flame 1-2 cm below, rotate slowly for 5-10 seconds
2. Ember check — tobacco should glow evenly around the entire perimeter (no black spots)
3. First draw — a few seconds, short, so the aroma stabilises
4. Real draws — deep but without inhaling (a cigar isn't a cigarette!)

**Our range:**
- **Xikar Stratosphere II** — single jet, *high-altitude ready* up to 4500m, refillable, lifetime warranty
- **S.T. Dupont Ligne 2** — soft flame, French classic, plated **palladium** or **gold**
- **Colibri Quasar Triple** — three jet flames in a row, 60+ ring compatible
- **Cedar matches (Fuente)** — traditional, sulphur-free, ideal for a gentle initial light

humidors.titlesr: Humidori — dom za cigaru koja čeka.
humidors.titleen: Humidors — a home for the waiting cigar.
humidors.excerptsr: **Španski kedar, digitalni higrometar, Boveda 69/72 paketi**. Magični broj — 70% relativne vlažnosti, 18-21°C — nije izabran slučajno: to je tačka na kojoj duvan ne pleše, ne sahne i ne raste.
humidors.excerpten: **Spanish cedar, digital hygrometer, Boveda 69/72 packs**. The magic number — 70% relative humidity, 18-21°C — wasn't chosen at random: it's the point at which tobacco doesn't mould, dry, or grow.
humidors.bodysr:
Humidor održava **dva broja**: **70% relativne vlažnosti** i **18-21°C**.

- Ispod 65% RH — cigara puca, gubi ulje, miris bledi
- Iznad 75% RH — započinju mikrobiološki procesi (plesni, *tobacco beetle Lasioderma serricorne*)

Zato je drvo iznutra uvek **španski kedar** (*Cedrela odorata*) — odbija insekte aromatičnim uljima i upija višak vlage. Edward Pinder je 1895. patentirao prvi komercijalni *cabinet humidor* za londonski klub St. James's.

**Tehnologije:**
- **Klasični humidor** sa solution gel-jedinicom (propilen glikol)
- **Boveda paketi** — dvosmerni, precizno kalibrisani 65/69/72/75% RH, bez kalibracije
- **Elektronski humidor** sa Peltier hlađenjem za toplije sredine (>22°C)

**Naš asortiman:**
- **Adorini Carrara M Deluxe** — italijanski klasik, 25 cigara, španski kedar, digitalni higrometar
- **Daniel Marshall 125-count** — američki premium, *burl walnut*, *Humido-Tech* sistem, do 125 cigara
- **Travel Adorini Cedro** — putni humidor, aluminijum + kedar, 5 cigara, Boveda slot
- **Boveda 69% 60g 12-pack** — set za održavanje, 12 paketa za 6-12 meseci

**Saveti za održavanje:**
- *Seasoning* — pre prve upotrebe humidora, navlaži kedar destilovanom vodom 1-2 nedelje
- Vlažnost menjaj sezonski: 65% RH za male/svetle cigare, 72% za maduro/cuba klasiku
- Higrometar kalibriraj jednom godišnje — koristi *salt test* (75% RH baseline)
- Cigaru rotiraj jednom mesečno za ravnomerno odležavanje

Kolekcionarski humidori dostižu cene preko 100.000 dolara. *Daniel Marshall Royal Humidor* prodat je 2018. za 185.000 dolara — burl javorov koren ojačan titanom.
humidors.bodyen:
A humidor maintains **two numbers**: **70% relative humidity** and **18-21°C**.

- Below 65% RH — the cigar cracks, loses oils, the aroma fades
- Above 75% RH — microbiological processes begin (mould, *tobacco beetle Lasioderma serricorne*)

That's why the inner wood is always **Spanish cedar** (*Cedrela odorata*) — its aromatic oils repel insects and absorb excess humidity. Edward Pinder patented the first commercial *cabinet humidor* in 1895 for London's St. James's Club.

**Technologies:**
- **Classic humidor** with solution gel unit (propylene glycol)
- **Boveda packs** — two-way, precisely calibrated to 65/69/72/75% RH, no calibration needed
- **Electronic humidor** with Peltier cooling for warmer environments (>22°C)

**Our range:**
- **Adorini Carrara M Deluxe** — Italian classic, 25 cigars, Spanish cedar, digital hygrometer
- **Daniel Marshall 125-count** — American premium, *burl walnut*, *Humido-Tech* system, up to 125 cigars
- **Travel Adorini Cedro** — travel humidor, aluminium + cedar, 5 cigars, Boveda slot
- **Boveda 69% 60g 12-pack** — maintenance set, 12 packs for 6-12 months

**Maintenance tips:**
- *Seasoning* — before first use, moisten the cedar with distilled water for 1-2 weeks
- Adjust humidity by season: 65% RH for small/light cigars, 72% for maduro/Cuban classics
- Calibrate the hygrometer annually — use the *salt test* (75% RH baseline)
- Rotate cigars monthly for even ageing

Collector humidors reach prices over $100,000. The *Daniel Marshall Royal Humidor* sold in 2018 for $185,000 — burl maple root reinforced with titanium.

ashtrays.excerptsr: **Mermer, kristal, bronza**. Mesto gde se cigara odmara između dva dima — teg, težina, tihi šarm. Naš asortiman: **Arturo Fuente Marble, Xikar Alpine Crystal, Les Fines Lames Le Monde, Cohiba Porcelain**.
ashtrays.excerpten: **Marble, crystal, bronze**. Where the cigar rests between draws — weight, heft, quiet charm. Our range: **Arturo Fuente Marble, Xikar Alpine Crystal, Les Fines Lames Le Monde, Cohiba Porcelain**.
ashtrays.bodysr:
Pepeljara je više od posude za pepeo — to je **stalno mesto cigare** dok pričate, čitate, ili samo gledate kako dim kruži.

**Šta čini dobru pepeljaru:**
- **Težina** (mermer, kristal) — da je vetar ne pomakne, da cigara ne ispadne
- **Slot dubok 4-6 cm** — drži cigaru pod uglom da se pepeo ne lomi prerano
- **Široka osnova** — pepeljara prima ash do 2-3 cm pre nego što se otkine (ash je deo iskustva!)
- **Materijal koji se lako čisti** — mermer/kristal/porcelan; ne aluminijum (oksidira)

**Slotovi po nameni:**
- **2 slota** — za 1-2 osobe, intimno
- **4 slota** — klasičan format, klub-stil
- **6 slota** — *cigar lounge*, za društva

**Naš asortiman:**
- **Arturo Fuente Marble Large** — italijanski karara mermer, 4 slota, ručno polirana, težina ~3kg
- **Xikar Alpine Crystal** — kristal sa mat bazom, 2 slota, *crystal cool* za toplu prostoriju
- **Les Fines Lames Le Monde** — bronzani dizajn, sa autentičnim potpisom francuskog atelijera
- **Cohiba Porcelain** — beli porcelan sa Cohiba logom, 4 slota, klasik

**Tehnika:**
- Pepeo **nikad ne lupaj** — pusti da otpadne sam (znači da je cigara dobro motana)
- Cigaru **nikad ne gasi vodom** — neka prosto izgori sama; gašenje *daje* gorak miris
- Pepeljara mora biti **viša od cigare** — slot drži glavu dovoljno visoko da pepeo ne pukne
ashtrays.bodyen:
The ashtray is more than a vessel for ash — it's the **permanent place of the cigar** while you talk, read, or just watch the smoke circle.

**What makes a good ashtray:**
- **Weight** (marble, crystal) — so wind doesn't move it, so the cigar doesn't fall
- **Slot 4-6 cm deep** — holds the cigar at an angle so the ash doesn't break too soon
- **Wide base** — the ashtray catches ash up to 2-3 cm before it falls off (the ash is part of the experience!)
- **Easy-to-clean material** — marble/crystal/porcelain; not aluminium (oxidises)

**Slots by use:**
- **2 slots** — for 1-2 people, intimate
- **4 slots** — classic format, club style
- **6 slots** — *cigar lounge*, for groups

**Our range:**
- **Arturo Fuente Marble Large** — Italian Carrara marble, 4 slots, hand-polished, weight ~3kg
- **Xikar Alpine Crystal** — crystal with matte base, 2 slots, *crystal cool* for warm rooms
- **Les Fines Lames Le Monde** — bronze design, authentic French atelier signature
- **Cohiba Porcelain** — white porcelain with Cohiba logo, 4 slots, a classic

**Technique:**
- **Never tap** the ash — let it fall by itself (it means the cigar is well-rolled)
- **Never put out a cigar with water** — let it simply burn out; extinguishing *gives* a bitter smell
- The ashtray must be **higher than the cigar** — the slot holds the head high enough that the ash doesn't break

cases.titleen: Travel cases — the cigar that travels.
cases.excerptsr: **Koža, aluminijum, karbon**. Za 3 ili 5 cigara, vlažnost stabilna tokom puta, miris nedirnut. Naš asortiman: **Xikar Travel Humidor, Davidoff Leather 3-Finger, Cohiba Red Dot Case, Xikar HumiX 10ct**.
cases.excerpten: **Leather, aluminium, carbon**. For 3 or 5 cigars, humidity stable on the road, aroma intact. Our range: **Xikar Travel Humidor, Davidoff Leather 3-Finger, Cohiba Red Dot Case, Xikar HumiX 10ct**.
cases.bodysr:
Futrola (*travel case*) rešava jedan problem: **kako sačuvati cigaru izvan humidora** — na putu, u kafiću, na sastanku.

**Tipovi:**
- **Mekana kožna futrola** — za 1-3 cigare, najlakša, fleksibilna; bez vlažnostne kontrole, samo zaštita 4-6 sati
- **Aluminijumski/karbonski tube** — za 1 cigaru, *cigar tube*, idealno za premium pojedinačnu vitolu
- **Travel humidor** — kombinacija futrole + Boveda paketa, **vlažnost stabilna do 30 dana**
- **Žičana futrola sa lock-om** — za 5-10 cigara, profesionalni putnici

**Materijali:**
- **Koža** (calfskin, kalfskin, full-grain) — klasik, miris kože komplementaran sa duvanom
- **Aluminijum** — najlakši, anti-shock, ali bez termo-izolacije (cigara se zagreva u toploj kabini)
- **Karbon** — premium, anti-shock + termo-izolacija + *carbon look*
- **Cedar-lined** — drvo iznutra, kao mali putni humidor

**Naš asortiman:**
- **Xikar Travel Humidor 5ct** — aluminijum, Boveda slot, 30+ dana stabilnosti
- **Davidoff Leather 3-Finger** — calfskin koža, *Cinzel* tag, klasika
- **Cohiba Red Dot Case** — karbonski kompozit sa crvenom Cohiba iglicom
- **Xikar HumiX 10ct** — full carbon, Boveda kompatibilan, 10 cigara, *crash-resistant*

**Pravila putovanja:**
- **Avion**: nosi cigare u kabinskom prtljagu (donji prtljag = ekstremna temperatura/vlažnost)
- **Topli sat**: izbegavaj direktno sunce — **karbon** je tu jer reflektuje toplotu
- **Hladna sezona**: pre paljenja drži cigaru 5-10 min na sobnoj temperaturi (cold-wet → cracking)
- **Carine**: u EU/Srbiji do **50 cigara po osobi** bez deklaracije; SAD/UK ima striktnija pravila — proveri pre puta
cases.bodyen:
The travel case solves one problem: **how to preserve a cigar outside the humidor** — on the road, in a café, at a meeting.

**Types:**
- **Soft leather case** — for 1-3 cigars, lightest, flexible; no humidity control, only 4-6 hours of protection
- **Aluminium/carbon tube** — for 1 cigar, *cigar tube*, ideal for a premium single vitola
- **Travel humidor** — case + Boveda pack combo, **humidity stable up to 30 days**
- **Wired case with lock** — for 5-10 cigars, professional travellers

**Materials:**
- **Leather** (calfskin, full-grain) — classic, leather scent complements tobacco
- **Aluminium** — lightest, anti-shock, but no thermal insulation (the cigar warms up in a hot cabin)
- **Carbon** — premium, anti-shock + thermal insulation + *carbon look*
- **Cedar-lined** — wood inside, like a small travel humidor

**Our range:**
- **Xikar Travel Humidor 5ct** — aluminium, Boveda slot, 30+ days stability
- **Davidoff Leather 3-Finger** — calfskin leather, *Cinzel* tag, classic
- **Cohiba Red Dot Case** — carbon composite with the red Cohiba pin
- **Xikar HumiX 10ct** — full carbon, Boveda compatible, 10 cigars, *crash-resistant*

**Travel rules:**
- **Plane**: carry cigars in cabin baggage (hold = extreme temperature/humidity)
- **Hot season**: avoid direct sun — **carbon** is there because it reflects heat
- **Cold season**: before lighting, let the cigar sit at room temperature 5-10 min (cold-wet → cracking)
- **Customs**: in EU/Serbia up to **50 cigars per person** without declaration; the US/UK has stricter rules — check before travel
